hints.api_endpoint: Visual model service URL. Volcengine Ark (Doubao) usually uses /api/v3; most OpenAI-compatible services use /v1.
hints.api_mode: doubao: Volcengine Ark (Doubao). openai: other Chat-compatible services (e.g. some third-party proxies).
hints.mic_use_visual_model: When on, mic uses the same API & model as capture above; when off, configure a mic-capable model in this tab.
hints.micProviderPreset: Pick a provider preset for mic replies; fills mic API endpoint and mode. OpenAI-compatible presets may not support audio—check model docs or enable「Supports microphone」in model profiles.
hints.mic_api_endpoint: Mic-only API endpoint. Doubao usually /api/v3; MiMo and OpenAI-compatible services /v1.
hints.mic_api_mode: API mode for mic requests. Mic needs doubao multimodal or MiMo mimo-v2.5.
hints.mic_model: Model that hears the mic and generates reply danmu; can differ from the vision model.
hints.mic_api_key: Mic API key, encrypted separately from capture key. Blank save won't overwrite existing key.
hints.model: Model name or endpoint ID. You can also save multiple endpoint/key/model sets in「Model profiles」below.
hints.screen_index: Which display to capture and overlay danmu on. Invalid index falls back to primary display.
hints.temperature: Creativity (0–2). Higher = more varied wording; lower = steadier, more formulaic tone.
hints.max_tokens: Max output length per AI reply. Thinking models get a higher effective minimum automatically.
hints.mic_mode_enabled: Experimental: after you speak, extra reply danmu are generated and shown out of order without affecting capture rhythm. Needs Doubao + mic-capable model; off by default; audio stays in memory only. Uses Windows default mic (Settings → System → Sound → Input); after switching headsets, stop danmu or restart.
hints.mic_window_sec: Seconds of recent mic audio sent with each utterance (1–30, default 5).
hints.btnMicTest: Records ~3s to check mic input. No network, upload, or file save.
hints.btnMicTestSend: After ~3s, sends audio + placeholder image to AI to verify mic input.
hints.api_key: API key stored locally encrypted. Leaving blank on Save won't overwrite existing key.
hints.normal_recognition_interval_sec: In normal mode, seconds between capture and danmu batch (1–60).
hints.normal_reply_count: In normal mode, fixed danmu count per capture (1–50).
hints.danmu_speed: Horizontal danmu speed (~0.5–5). Higher = faster scroll.
hints.danmu_lines: Max danmu track rows on screen (12–20).
hints.danmu_max_chars: Target length for AI danmu (5–80); written into the prompt contract. Does not truncate on-screen text. Default ~20 CN / ~50 EN if unset.
hints.danmu_font_family: System font for horizontal danmu. Blank or invalid name uses default.
hints.dedup_threshold: Similarity threshold vs recent danmu (0–1). Higher = more duplicates dropped; default ~0.5.
hints.layout_mode: Danmu area as fraction of screen (full, 3/4, 1/2, 1/4).
hints.hotkey: Global hotkey to start/stop danmu. OS may ask to allow keyboard listening first time.
hints.eviction_mode: Natural: normal scroll off screen. Accelerated: old danmu clear faster on scene change.
hints.danmu_pending_entry_cap: Max pending danmu in entry zone (right edge). Default 300; 0 = unlimited. Drops farthest off-screen items, not new ones.
hints.danmu_track_retention_cap: Max total danmu on all tracks. Default 600; 0 = unlimited; drops off-screen pending first.
hints.reply_queue_max_items: Max queued AI replies before display. 0 = no trim; >0 drops oldest from front when exceeded.
hints.empty_accel: When a track is empty, briefly speed up scroll to fill the gap.
hints.danmu_render_mode: Horizontal: full-screen transparent overlay scroll. Bottom-to-top: narrow right panel scrolls up. Use borderless/windowed fullscreen for games; exclusive fullscreen may hide danmu.
hints.floating_panel_width: Bottom-to-top panel width (200–800 px), right side by default.
hints.floating_panel_speed: Bottom-to-top scroll speed (0.5–5.0, default 1). Higher = faster (~120×speed px/s).
hints.floating_panel_x_offset: Floating panel distance from right edge (px).
hints.floating_panel_font_size: Font size per danmu in floating panel (12–48 px).
hints.floating_panel_max_items: Max simultaneous danmu in floating panel; FIFO drops oldest.
hints.image_max_width: Screenshot width before sending to AI. Smaller = less bandwidth/cost; larger = sharper.
hints.image_quality: JPEG quality 1–100, default 85. Higher = clearer, larger file.
hints.btnProbe: Test AI with current endpoint, mode, and key—no danmu, no other changes.
hints.liveTopicInput: Game or stream topic for more contextual danmu. Empty = not injected; best under 50 chars, max 200.
hints.userNicknameInput: Your nickname for AI to use naturally. Global, persona-independent; max 20 chars.
hints.personaSelect: Persona template to edit. Built-ins can be overwritten; use Restore defaults to reset.
hints.personaContract: Read-only JSON output contract. Count syncs with Danmu display settings; change count there.
hints.personaSystemCustom: Extra style/persona appended to system prompt; applies after Save persona.
hints.memeBarrageEnabled: When on, meme danmu are collected/displayed separately per settings below.
hints.memeCollectInterval: Meme collect interval (1–60s). Pulls a batch of candidates each interval.
hints.memeDisplayInterval: Meme display interval (1–60s). Shows danmu from queue each interval.
hints.btnMemeBarrageClear: Clears local meme library and display queue; on-screen danmu unchanged.
hints.poolCustomEnabled: When on, pulls short lines from your custom pool when danmu count is low.
hints.poolMinOnScreen: When on-screen danmu fall below this, pull from custom pool. 0 disables fill.
hints.poolCustomTextarea: One short line per row; full display on screen. Duplicates skipped.
hints.poolCustomSelectAll: When checked, select all custom lines for batch delete.
hints.petEnabled: Shows desktop pet; use pet context menu to hide temporarily.
hints.petAlwaysOnTop: Keeps pet window always on top.
hints.petClickThrough: Mouse passes through pet; dragging disabled.
hints.petCommandBoxEnabled: Double-click pet to open danmu command box.
hints.petCommandTtl: Command valid for this many seconds (5–300), then expires.
hints.petCommandApplyCount: Max screenshot danmu generations per command (1–5).
hints.petCommandInput: Debug-inject danmu command on Web; merged into next normal capture, not immediate AI call.
hints.btnPetImportFolder: Import pet assets from folder with pet.json and spritesheet.webp or .png.
hints.btnPetResetAsset: Restore built-in default pet; your local asset files are kept.
hints.hintMemeCategoryTitle: Random: from full library. Custom: up to 3 tags. Local: imported meme lines only.
hints.hintMemeDisplayModeTitle: Show all: all collects go to display queue. AI pick: AI filters candidates by current screen.
hints.hintMemeTagTitle: Tags only for Custom category, max 3.
hints.hintMemeCollectTitle: Meme collect rhythm: interval seconds and batch size.
hints.hintMemeDisplayTitle: Meme display rhythm: interval seconds and batch size.
hints.hintPersonaActiveTitle: Multiple checked personas: one random per round; Save active list to apply.
hints.custom-models: Model profiles: multiple endpoint/model/key sets with optional default; keys separate from global above.
hints.compress-preview: Upload a sample image to preview compression at current max width and JPEG quality. In-memory only.
